summary: Phase 3 Deferred Slice 6 is complete. A deterministic shared action catalog (PET_ACTIONS in src/shared/petActions.ts) defines the three built-in actions (toggle-window, explode, next-character). A testable createPetActionRegistry(handlers) factory produces a registry with listActions() defensive copies in stable order and dispatch(actionId) validated safe results for unknown or failed actions. Six tests cover all required areas. src/main.ts instantiates the registry with existing toggle/explode/switch-character handlers and routes dispatchHotkey through it. The verification script passes all checks. No forbidden plugin, backend, notification, or dynamic code features are present.
evidence: scripts/verify-phase3-deferred6.ps1 passes: 17/17 checks pass, exit code 0, passed=true
src/shared/petActions.ts defines Object.freeze'd PET_ACTIONS catalog with toggle-window, explode, next-character
src/shared/petActions.ts exports createPetActionRegistry(handlers) with listActions() defensive copies and dispatch(actionId) validated dispatch with safe error results
src/shared/petActions.test.ts contains 6 tests: catalog shape, stable listing/defensive copies, known action dispatch, unknown action safety, handler-key-catalog validation, handler failure safety
npm run build passes for main, renderer, and preload bundles
src/main.ts imports createPetActionRegistry, instantiates it with toggle/explode/switch-character handlers, and dispatchHotkey delegates to petActionRegistry.dispatch(action)
No forbidden files: externalPlugins.ts, pluginLoader.ts, backend.ts, notifications.ts all absent
No eval(), Function(), dynamic import, require(), fetch(), Notification, file dialog, or plugin loading patterns
manual_verification_required: Existing menu and hotkey actions still work through the built-in action registry
Unknown or failed actions do not crash the app
No external plugin loading, dynamic code execution, user scripts, backend, notification, upload, or cloud behavior is present
next_maker_instruction: Do not advance to another slice until the human manual gate is approved.
